details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest adult beginner weekend evening class under $35
Task 2: Choose cheaper membership with >=4 sessions and submit inquiry
Task 3: Reserve indoor hard court for doubles 90-minute evening slot
Task 4: Schedule earliest weekday >=4pm private lesson with 4.5+ backhand coach
Task 5: Enroll 10-year-old in July 15 morning half-day camp under $300
Task 6: Create 3-session weekly training plan under $120 (group classes)
Task 7: Register for singles tournament in 3.0–3.5 skill bracket
Task 8: Save serve technique and injury prevention articles to reading list
